record.conformance_procedure: Import installed pygrc==0.1, verify declared public capabilities and the concrete callable methods behind all seven operation classes, construct each registered W0 fixture in a fresh worker, validate route aspects, snapshot state, and require empty queue and surface logs without scheduling a candidate operation
record.producer_transition_discipline: No availability-driven substitution is allowed; the registered RCAE adapter remains active even if native functionality later appears, and native transition requires a new profile, cycle freeze, and rerun
record.replay_procedure: Recreate the locally configured environment, bind the exact PyGRC identity without recording its path, rebuild all 21 W0 baseline entries in fresh workers, and compare canonical registry and receipt digests
record.transfer_scope: P2-I1 registered Option A binding and operation classes only; scientific behavior and execution authorization are excluded
